title: SkullClient
description: Collection of FPS boosting mods and essential mods for pvp. Brings every single mod you will need for PVP
body:
A lightweight Minecraft PvP-focused modpack designed to improve visibility, performance, and combat awareness while keeping the game close to vanilla gameplay.

This modpack carefully combines some of the most useful PvP utility and optimization mods available on Modrinth. The goal is simple: provide a smooth and competitive PvP experience with better FPS, clearer visuals, and helpful HUD information.

# Key Features

PvP Visibility Improvements

Clear Water and Clear Lava for better underwater visibility

No Fog for improved sight distance

Custom brightness settings for darker areas

Low fire and low shield textures (via included resource pack) to reduce screen obstruction during combat

## Useful PvP Utilities

Armor HUD for quick durability awareness

Status Effect Timer for precise potion tracking

Shulker Box Tooltip to instantly preview shulker contents

Shield Fixes for more consistent shield behavior

Navigation & Awareness

Minimap for nearby navigation

World Map for exploring larger areas

## Performance Optimization
This modpack includes several well-known performance mods to significantly improve game performance and stability, including:

Sodium

Lithium

Iris (shader support)

additional optimization and performance improvements

These mods help increase FPS and reduce lag compared to many heavier PvP clients.

## Extra Tools

Simple Voice Chat support

Replay Mod for recording fights and gameplay

Various small quality-of-life improvements useful for PvP
# 
# Included Resource Pack

The modpack also contains a custom PvP resource pack created specifically for this pack. It includes:

Low shield model

Low fire texture

Small cosmetic adjustments designed to improve PvP visibility

# Customization

Not every player wants the same setup. If there are mods you do not want to use, you can disable them directly in the Modrinth Launcher.

Goals of This Modpack

Improve FPS and performance

Provide better combat visibility

Add useful PvP tools without changing core gameplay

Keep the setup simple and customizable
